product_updates.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
product_updates.content: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

product_updates.title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
product_updates.content: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

product_updates.title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
product_updates.content: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.

product_updates.title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
product_updates.content: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.

product_updates.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
product_updates.content: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

product_updates.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
product_updates.content: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

product_updates.title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
product_updates.content: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.

product_updates.title: World launches tool to verify humans behind AI shopping agents
product_updates.content: As AI agents take the reins for online shoppers, Sam Altman's unconventional startup is looking to expand its verification offerings to support agentic commerce.

product_updates.title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
product_updates.content: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.

product_updates.title: Gamma adds AI image-generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
product_updates.content: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Pentagon is planning for AI companies to train on classified data, defense official says
technical_breakthroughs.content: The Pentagon is discussing plans to set up secure environments for generative AI companies to train military-specific versions of their models on classified data, MIT Technology Review has learned. AI models like Anthropic’s Claude are already used to answer questions in classified settings; appl…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Researchers disclose vulnerabilities in IP KVMs from four manufacturers
technical_breakthroughs.content: Internet-exposed devices that give BIOS-level access? What could possibly go wrong?

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: OpenAI’s US military deal, and Grok’s CSAM lawsuit
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
